title: Senior Radiologist at PGIMER Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at PGIMER Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? PGIMER Advisory Limited in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PGIMER Advisory Limited:
PGIMER Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER Advisory Limited!
